This is just an overview. So first thing you want to do is take a look at the opt-in page. You can click on edit page. And what we'll find is we have some testimonials. We're not using before and after pictures because we don't want to get flagged by Facebook. For displaying before and after. So we just have some after pictures with some cool testimonials in there from 12 week challenges. And if you want to make any of this your own, you can, but this page is pretty much ready to go. And when they click on yes, I want in, it will take them to the application page. So let's head there. We're going to jump out of here. And now we go to the application page. So we're going to click on edit page here. This page, it will be okay for you to have before and afters because it is not the first page in your funnel that Facebook has seen. And you should not get flagged for this. However, if your ads are getting disapproved, this might be something to take a look at. So here is some copy. This is where you're going to want to change it to be your own. You don't have to change any of these before and afters if you don't want to. This is the area where you'd want to put your picture in, put your name in there. And there's a couple other areas where you could change the copy if you'd like to. So your picture and then change this here. So when you click on this button, any of these buttons, they're all set to go to pop up. So you click there and then you click on a set action and it will say open the pop up. So it's already preset for that. So when you go to the pop up, you click on a show pop up and here is your custom script. Click on that. And here you will see open code editor. You click on that and that's where you post your, or paste your WooFoo form. So you'll need to create a form in WooFoo that goes over a 12 week application and basically all the questions that you want to ask them. And we'll give you an example of what one looks like, but you'll want to make it your own. So when they fill out that form, that will get sent to you and you'll have all of those answers. Now, that covers everything you'll need to do on this page. When you're done pasting that, you'll click save. And now this page is built for your own. So we're going to get out of here. We're going to go to the thank you page. So here we have the thank you page. We're going to click on edit page. And the first thing we want to do is click on this JavaScript HTML open code editor. And this is where you're going to paste your acuity link. And for your appointment, so your appointment type link for your phone call, that code will go right there. And how to get that appointment set up and everything will be in the tech course. Then you'll want to edit the information here where it says save this number as and then put your gym name in there because it's very important. And then you'll want to change out Alex's name here. And that is all you have to do. So you will just end up saving, click save, and you will send traffic to this by pasting this link here. Whoops.
